description: Curated, machine- and human-usable list of journalists, reporters, independent livestreamers, and documenters covering protests, high-tension events, immigration actions, campus actions, and political demonstrations (primarily 2020-2026 waves: BLM/Portland, Minneapolis, anti-ICE, campus encampments, etc.). Many are independent or small-collective with self-funded or donation models and do raw on-the-ground work.

usage.orchestrator: Loaded by live_stream_orchestrator.py (and copies). discovery_keywords (or fallback name+' live') are turned into ytsearchN: terms. live_status=is_live filter ensures only actual current lives. High priority get direct channel/live URL attempts where possible. Also seeds X/TG chat discovery hints.
usage.site: Fetched as data/sources.json by the SPA. Rendered in Monitor sidebar under Active Sources for context (who the intel may be coming from). Extra fields like priority/focus are ignored by current simple renderer but available for future UI.
usage.agent_tools: Used to expand searches (x_keyword_search from:handle, semantic on names, Firecrawl on profiles for FB/IG/TT lives). GitHub is the durable canonical source of truth.
usage.research_pipeline: bootstrap-sample-data.py, generate-data.py, and listener use related streams; this list helps seed realistic or real discovery.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Unicorn Riot
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Decentralized nonprofit media org with on-the-ground reporters (Niko Georgiades, Dan Feidt, Christopher Schiano & team). Raw, extended livestreams from protests and direct actions.
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.notes: One of the best for reliable multi-hour ground livestreams suitable for yt-dlp m3u8 + Whisper. Frequently in Portland/Minneapolis/anti-ICE actions.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Georgia Fort
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Independent journalist and Emmy-winning reporter based in Minneapolis/St. Paul area. Strong on-the-ground and Facebook livestream presence.
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.notes: More FB/IG/TikTok live oriented than dedicated long YT. Good for X cross-posts and agent discovery.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Don Lemon
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Former CNN anchor now independent; occasional live protest and event coverage streams on his YouTube show/platform.
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.notes: Higher production; less raw 'on the ground cam' but useful for broader context. Verify live_status.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Nick Sortor
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: On-scene independent video documenter and reporter. Primary X video posts + Newsmax/YouTube appearances. Strong rapid-response coverage of events.
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.notes: Excellent for real-time visual intel via X. May clip rather than run 8hr+ raw lives; use agent x_keyword_search for 'live' announcements from the handle.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Matt Tardio
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Independent livestreamer and on-the-ground coverage.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Bret Hamilton (Cinemarxism)
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Livestreams news, politics, and protest coverage (e.g. campus encampments).
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.notes: Twitch-focused; orchestrator currently YT-primary but extensible.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Nathan Stolpman (Lift the Veil Too)
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Long-running independent protest and event livestream coverage.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Chelly Bouferrache
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Independent journalist and livestreamer focused on Portland ICE protests and related actions.
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.notes: Fits the raw on-the-ground use case well.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Thomas Allen
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Independent right-wing livestreamer active at Portland ICE protests and similar events.
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.notes: Provides one perspective in multi-source coverage.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Andrew Mercado (Mercado Media)
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Livestreams of ICE raids, protests, and operations in the Minneapolis/St. Paul area (e.g. Operation Metro Surge).
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.notes: Directly relevant to recent anti-ICE / facility actions. Good YT channel for targeted search.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Carissa Dez
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Multi-platform independent journalist and livestreamer (PDX/DVMedia). Active on protests, ICE actions, and local events.
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.notes: Excellent multi-platform ground presence; reliable for capture.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Tuck Woodstock
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: On-the-ground filming and coverage, especially Portland protests.
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.notes: Strong visual documentation; pair with X search for live indications.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Sergio Olmos
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Portland protest coverage and on-scene filming.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Cristina Panagi
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Independent on-scene video at immigration protests (e.g. New Jersey area).

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Savannah Hernandez
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Reporter covering protests and political events (video documentation).

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Nate Friedman
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Independent journalist doing investigative coverage of protests and related claims.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Portland independent livestreamer network (rotating)
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Various independent and collective documenters active during 2020 nightly protests and ongoing actions. Individuals rotate; follow Unicorn Riot / local X accounts for current handles.
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.notes: Use the specific high-priority Portland names above + these broad terms. Rotating nature means discovery relies on current titles + X tips.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Minneapolis / St. Paul independent livestreamers (rotating)
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Frequent on-the-ground streams from BLM era through Daunte Wright, anti-ICE facility actions, and later protests.
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.notes: See also Andrew Mercado and Carissa Dez for consistent coverage in the area.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Various Twitch protest coverage streamers
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Multi-angle and long-duration streams at campus protests, urban demos, and high-tension events.
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.notes: Twitch requires separate handling or browser-assisted discovery in current pipeline.

journalists_reporters_livestreamers.name: Ramsey Orta (historical reference)
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.description: Citizen journalist known for video documentation (Eric Garner incident and related). Included for historical context of on-the-ground citizen journalism.
journalists_reporters_livestreamers.notes: Not expected for current live discovery; archival value only.

tiktok_livestreamers.name: Taylor Lorenz
tiktok_livestreamers.description: Independent journalist covering news, tech, and events with on-platform live and video.
tiktok_livestreamers.discovery_note: TikTok LIVE support in yt-dlp is limited and often requires cookies/login. Prefer Firecrawl scrape of profile or X announcements for discovery. Ephemeral.

tiktok_livestreamers.name: @Spectacles.news
tiktok_livestreamers.description: Citizen journalist / news creator using TikTok for protest and event coverage.

tiktok_livestreamers.name: @datdamndasher
tiktok_livestreamers.description: Citizen journalist / news-focused creator active during events.

tiktok_livestreamers.name: Dave Jorgenson (Washington Post)
tiktok_livestreamers.description: News explainers and coverage including protest contexts on TikTok.

tiktok_livestreamers.name: Gloria Pazmino (CNN)
tiktok_livestreamers.description: On-the-ground reporting from ICE detention centers and protests.

tiktok_livestreamers.name: Anonymous / pseudonymous citizen journalists & protesters (TikTok)
tiktok_livestreamers.description: Real-time streams and raw footage during 2020 BLM, 2024 campus encampments, 2025-2026 anti-ICE/LA/political actions. Handles rotate quickly.
tiktok_livestreamers.discovery_note: Anonymous/short-term accounts common. Best discovered via X semantic search for 'tiktok live' + event keywords, or Firecrawl on trending protest tags. yt-dlp extraction often needs fresh cookies and has low reliability for long capture.

notes: This list powers automated YouTube live discovery (strict live_status filter — never trust titles alone) and provides transparent context in the public Monitor view. Many operate independently. Platforms and handles change; always re-verify. For non-YouTube (FB/IG/TT): see the detailed import challenges section in the site UI. GitHub (c2wbcnvnv6-netizen/frontlines-sources) is the canonical editable source of truth — update here, then sync to local research/ and site/data/ copies. Agent-only health/ops monitoring of sources is not exposed publicly.
